title: calonema brumale
intro: Calonema brumale, also known as the wintergreen, is a perennial plant that belongs to the heath family and is native to Europe. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which contain methyl salicylate, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Calonema brumale include relieving pain and inflammation, as well as treating headaches, fever, and rheumatism. The herbal preparations of Calonema brumale include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used externally or internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
